description_long: This house is a large, modern residential property set within a walled compound, surrounded by rows of evenly spaced trees and featuring a spacious landscaped garden. The main building has a low, sprawling footprint with multiple interconnected sections, including a central courtyard and several flat and gently sloped roof segments. Adjacent to the house is a large rectangular lawn or sports field, bordered by a fence and a small outbuilding, suggesting recreational or communal use. The property is accessed by a wide driveway leading to a gated entrance, with paved walkways and garden beds visible throughout the grounds. The exterior materials appear to be a mix of light-colored stone or concrete, glass, and wood, with large windows and open spaces for natural light. The overall layout emphasizes privacy, outdoor living, and a blend of functional and aesthetic landscaping.
description: A modern, expansive house with multiple rooflines, large windows, and a landscaped compound featuring a sports field and tree-lined boundaries. The property includes a central courtyard, paved walkways, and a secure gated entrance.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from above with the main entrance, central courtyard, and adjacent sports field clearly visible, along with the tree-lined street and perimeter wall.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the rear of the property, showcasing the sports field in the foreground and the house complex set deeper within the compound.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a perspective from the opposite side, emphasizing the sports field to the left and the house with its multiple roof sections and garden areas.
description_view_3: View 3 presents the house from the front, with the main entrance, driveway, and landscaped garden most prominent, as well as the full extent of the tree-lined boundary.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Wide main entry with a paved approach, low steps, and a prominent gate; no porch but landscaped with garden beds and flanked by trees.
